text: Inside this luminous, modern space, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and detachment. The sterile quietude is only barely offset by the hum of the neon lights and the digital displays. Entering the R+D exhibit, I sense a deep undercurrent of inquiry and potential — as if I am about to witness, or even participate in, the unfolding of new ideas. Still, the environment's calculated organization makes me self-aware, not quite embedded, hovering between observer and participant.
